alkylation reagent: 20 mM iodoacetamide (30 min, in dark, R.T.)
alkylation concentration: 20 mM iodoacetamide (30 min, in dark, R.T.)
fragmentation method: High-energy collisional dissociation product-dependent electron-transfer/higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD pd EThcD)
instrument: an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
labeling: the labeling of O-GlcNAcylated proteins were analyzed by in-gel fluorescence scanning
